name: 8-Bit Lattice
description: 256 axioms as all combinations of 8 dualities

axioms.question: What exists when we hold Origin, Generation, Self, Internal, Structure, Time, Signal, Open?
What exists when we hold Mirror, Generation, Self, Internal, Structure, Time, Signal, Open?
What exists when we hold Mirror, Constraint, Other, External, Flow, Eternity, Noise, Closed?
